UW-28  POSTWELD HEAT TREATMENT. (a) Postweld heat treatment (PWHT) shall be performed on welded vessels and parts when required by this paragraph and the applicable material requirements. (b) For carbon and low alloy steel vessels, PWHT requirements shall be as specified in UCS-79. For high alloy steel vessels, see UHA-34. (c) PWHT procedures shall be qualified and performed in accordance with UW-40. Exemptions from PWHT are permitted as provided by UW-29. The temperature and holding time shall meet the requirements of the applicable material paragraph. See also UCS-56 for the interaction between PWHT and impact testing.
